item.title: Heartbreak as Japan’s wonder strike sinks Matildas in thrilling Asian Cup final
item.description: The Aussies threw everything at their highly rated opponents but fell just short.

item.title: Liberals suffer the worst election defeat in South Australia history as Labor’s Peter Malinauskas surges to a second term
item.description: ‘Sometimes it doesn’t rain when you want it to.’

item.title: Back‑to‑back triumph for Labor Premier Peter Malinauskas as the Liberal vote collapses across South Australia
item.description: ‘Let’s be proud and patriotic in the Australian way.’

item.title: Devastated Matildas star Caitlin Foord takes ‘a lot of responsibility’ for Asian Cup final loss to Japan
item.description: Mary Fowler showed class beyond her years as she moved to console her tearful teammate.

item.title: Rising Aussie tennis star Talia Gibson the talk of Miami Open with ‘fantastic’ win over former world No.1 Naomi Osaka
item.description: It’s the 21-year-old’s month and ‘we’re just living in it’ after her fourth straight win over a current top-20 star.

item.title: Joe Montemurro details what ‘scared’ Matildas need to fix ahead of 2027 World Cup
item.description: As the golden generation risks breaking up without a trophy, the new breed has been urged to change one thing.

item.title: Newly discovered photos show Neil Armstrong after Gemini 8 emergency
item.description: Neil Armstrong’s ability to keep calm during the Gemini 8 emergency was instrumental to his being named commander of Apollo 11.

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: Charles Evans’ daughter Kimeaka Bermingham labels father a ‘monster’ after death of Alicia Little
item.description: ‘I remember not being shocked or surprised one bit.’

item.title: Former NSW premier Dominic Perrottet and wife Helen welcome eighth child in Washington, DC
item.description: The newborn’s country of birth means he could one-up his famous father.

item.title: Kylie Minogue performs exclusive $3 million concert at billionaire Anthony Pratt’s Melbourne mansion
item.description: The billionaire chairman has built a reputation for securing superstar performances at his annual gatherings.

item.title: US President Donald Trump faces backlash over response to death of former FBI director Robert Mueller
item.description: Donald Trump's shocking online response to the death of the decorated war hero and former FBI director sparked outrage.

item.title: ‘Complete lifestyle shift’: Almost half of Gen Z living in Australian cities are considering a move to the regions
item.description: A house with a backyard was an impossible dream for a young Sydney couple — then they moved inland.

item.title: New Aussie record still not enough as Jessica Hull cops another 1500m near-miss at world indoor championships
item.description: The superstar is adamant ‘my time is coming’ after being beaten to that elusive global gold once again.

item.title: Radio star Kyle Sandilands takes ARN to court over termination of $100 million contract
item.description: The looming court battle follows a dramatic on-air fallout with his long-time co-host Jackie O Henderson.

item.title: Chappell Roan hits back at claim she made Brazilian soccer star Jorginho Frello’s stepdaughter cry
item.description: The singer has spoken out amid accusations she mistreats her supporters.

item.title: Sarah ‘Fergie’ Ferguson addresses reports she’s cloning Queen Elizabeth’s corgis for new reality TV show
item.description: The ex-wife of disgraced former Prince Andrew has made herself ‘absolutely clear’ in a statement.

item.title: Tallarook Hotel in Victoria holds raffle for 20L can of diesel amid fuel shortage crisis
item.description: The country hotel has come up with its own solution to our fuel crisis.

item.title: Aussie tennis revelation Talia Gibson joins greats with another huge top-20 upset at the Miami Open
item.description: The 21-year-old has set up her toughest test yet after continuing an Ash Barty-like march through the unofficial ‘fifth major’.

item.title: Hollywood star Denise Richards reveals new look after undergoing facelift
item.description: The 55-year-old admitted she was ‘terrified’ to go under the knife.

item.title: Elderly rapper speaks out after suffering horrific mishap while suspended above stage
item.description: ‘Nothing can put me down.’

item.title: A look inside My Reno Rules judge Neale Whitaker's new South Coast cottage
item.description: Neale Whitaker and his husband David bought a Berry home.

item.title: Government wipes 1.2 million Centrelink debts as waiver threshold raised
item.description: Almost half of the social security debt backlog has been wiped out.

item.title: ABC staff to strike on Wednesday over pay and working conditions
item.description: ‘They should never have been pushed to this point.’

item.title: Corentin Moutet hits back at Danielle Collins in wild tennis feud over flirting claim
item.description: The world No.33 immediately shut down the Australian Open villain for doing ‘stupid things’ for attention.

item.title: Pilot, copilot killed after Air Canada plane collides with vehicle at New York’s LaGuardia Airport
item.description: Footage from the scene shows significant damage to the cockpit.

item.title: Middle East war: Fresh Europe routes land for Australians as airlines avoid traditional UAE, Qatar hubs
item.description: More than 21,000 flights have been axed, crippling major hubs and forcing airlines to reroute passengers through Asia and beyond.

item.title: Adrian Dodoro and Brad Scott top the list as Kane Cornes unveils ‘wheel of blame’ to explain Essendon disaster
item.description: The commentator has revealed who is most at fault for the club’s current plight.

item.title: Middle East War live updates: US President Donald Trump delays Iran power plant strike ultimatum hours before deadline
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Dual rugby code great Wendell Sailor arrested by nine cops on drunken night out
item.description: The NRL and Wallabies legend threatened a bar manager before asking ‘do you know who I am?’

item.title: Charlie Kirk’s mentor and right-wing media trailblazer Jeff Webb killed in freak pickleball accident
item.description: The conservative activist said the US had ‘lost a future president’ after Kirk was assassinated.

item.title: England great slams review into Ashes disaster that saw no changes to key leadership roles: ‘Treat us like idiots’
item.description: The ECB have completed a ‘thorough review’ into the disastrous series loss.

item.title: Security group warns Australia’s democracy is being threatened by ‘anti-climate-action propaganda’
item.description: ‘If these threats are not checked, accelerating climate change will crash society as we know it.’

item.title: Kyle Sandilands court documents reveal job perks as he fights ARN contract termination
item.description: The embattled radio star’s flight allowance alone was more than the average Australian salary.

item.title: Nu Harvest owner Georgie Stevenson apologises over petrol price comments
item.description: The owner of the popular supplement brand has since apologised, pointing the finger at someone else.

item.title: Bill Cosby guilty of sexual assault, woman awarded $US59 million in California civil suit
item.description: ‘She woke up in her house with all her clothes off, except her underwear on - no top, no bra, and no pants.’

item.title: Business leaders not on board with proposed working from home solution to increasing fuel prices
item.description: Leaders are urging Australians to look back on what happened during COVID.

item.title: Aussie Talia Gibson’s giant-killing run in Miami comes to disappointing end
item.description: The 21-year-old couldn’t repeat her heroics against the world No.2.

item.title: At least 66 killed in military plane crash in Colombia, head of armed forces says
item.description: Dozens more have been injured after the transport crashed shortly after take-off in Colombia.

item.title: Critics slam 'ham-fisted' plan to crack down on e-bikes as NSW, Queensland introduce harsh new laws
item.description: ‘Bringing in newer, tougher penalties, that’s just smoke and mirrors.’

item.title: Cheaper food, wine, cars and clothes to flow under 'hard yakka' European Union trade deal
item.description: But furious meat farmers say the deal is ‘appalling’ for agricultural and regional Australia.

item.title: Thieves siphon fuel from parked cars as petrol shortage crisis deepens to impact fruit and vegetable store prices
item.description: As the fuel shortage spirals out of control, heartless criminals are now targeting cars parked on the street.

item.title: Bluesfest cancelled: Relief for ticketholders as PayPal relaxes refund policy
item.description: Fans were given a glimmer of hope of Monday ... and it works.

item.title: Shock feud between AFL coaches Ross Lyon and Chris Fagan explained
item.description: ‘That is genuinely the feeling coming out of the playing group, as well as the footy department.’

item.title: Shrinkflation strikes Easter haul as new figures show chocolate products smaller and dearer
item.description: Some beloved chocolate products have almost doubled in price despite the cost of its key ingredient nosediving.

item.title: Mel Schilling cancer diagnosis: TV star and dating coach dies aged 53
item.description: ‘To honour Mel, please live life to the full, love your people well, and try not to sweat the small stuff.’

item.title: The toll Middle East conflict is taking on Lebanon as Israel battles Iran-linked Hezbollah
item.description: ‘We didn’t find any bodies.’

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.description: ‘I never understood the truth of the phrase ‘she lights up a room’ until I met Mel.’

item.title: Russia fires nearly 400 drones in deadly Ukraine attack
item.description: Almost 400 long-range drones, along with more than 20 cruise missiles and seven ballistic missiles hit several locations.

item.description: ‘I spoke to a lot of people and nobody could really give me a compelling case either way.’

item.description: ‘The government needs to act on it very quickly.’

item.description: ‘It’s early days, we’ll get better. We’ve just got to stay the course. It’s really early in the season.’

item.description: ‘It’s going to be fantastic for the industry.’

item.description: The $3.8b stadium continues to face legal challenges as a separate arena pushes ahead toward a 2031 opening.

item.title: High-tech thieves using legal key fob generator device to steal cars across Australia
item.description: A family's dream holiday turned into a nightmare when thieves used a legal device to clone their car keys.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: AFL pressure gauge: Extreme spotlight suddenly lands on five AFL stars ahead of Round 3
item.description: It’s not even Round 3 and suddenly the ‘battling star’ is looking at his ‘last chance’.

item.title: Meta, Google lose US trial over social media addiction
item.description: A US jury has ruled YouTube and Instagram were ‌negligent in the design ‌of their apps ⁠and the companies that own them failed to warn about their dangers.

item.title: US-Iran war live updates: Iran rejects US President Donald Trump’s 15-point peace plan to end war
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Volkswagen in talks to produce missile defence parts at car factory – report
item.description: The Volkswagen factory that currently makes the T-Roc Cabriolet could be converted to make components that serve a missile defence system.

item.title: Hero of Bondi Beach terror attack Ahmed Al Ahmed honoured with keys to the city by Waverley Council
item.description: ‘His instinctive courage, his willingness to put others first, and his quiet bravery will never be forgotten.’

item.title: ABC staff slam broadcaster as they vow to continue fight for fair pay and conditions: ‘S*** boyfriend’
item.description: Workers at the national broadcaster have signalled further strike action if their demands aren’t met.

item.title: Ford not looking to challenge Chevrolet, Ram with bigger Super Duty in Australia
item.description: Ford isn't looking to bring the F-Series Super Duty range to challenge the Silverado HD and Ram 2500/3500, citing low customer interest.

item.title: Date, time and ticket prices for MCG’s San Francisco 49ers v Los Angeles Rams clash revealed
item.description: Australia’s love for American football is about to be put to the test.

item.title: Whittlesea Bakehouse claims title of nation’s best hot cross bun for 2026
item.description: ‘I believe if you’ve got the love and the passion, the magic just works.’

item.title: Oscar Piastri makes light of F1 disaster with five-word gag ahead of Japan Grand Prix
item.description: The Aussie ‘comedian’ has won over even more fans despite failing to reach the start line this season.

item.title: Police seeking man ‘critical’ to investigation into fatal Lidcombe shooting
item.description: Two men were shot in the attack at a Sydney apartment, with one dying soon after.

item.title: Baby name trends revealed in list of NSW’s most popular newborn monikers
item.description: Eight names have entered or returned to the list.

item.title: Telstra increases price on postpaid and pre-paid mobile plans for millions of customers
item.description: Australia’s peak body for communications consumers called the move a ‘slap in the face’.

item.title: Lachie Neale shares personal post on Instagram after split from wife Jules as Brisbane Lions season begins
item.description: Brisbane Lions star Lachie Neale has offered a rare glimpse into his personal life, sharing a post that seemingly points to his feelings, months after his separation from wife Jules Neale.

item.title: Embattled Essendon coach Brad Scott explains post-match comments on young star Nate Caddy
item.description: The embattled coach has explained why he said it, and the instant result.

item.title: AFL veteran Tom Lynch comes clean on ‘rude finger’ team photo incident on Unfiltered
item.description: After the shoot, the ‘annoyed’ photographer had to completely airbrush it from history.

item.title: Volkswagen ID. Polo, ID. Polo GTI EV hatches leaked online ahead of reveal
item.description: Volkswagen's new light EV, the ID. Polo, has been leaked completely undisguised in a range of variants, including the sporty GTI flagship.

item.title: Woman pleads not guilty to all charges connected to shooting at Rihanna’s Los Angeles home
item.description: The Grammy winner was at home with her partner and their children when shots were fired at the property.

item.title: Measles alert for Brisbane International Airport after infected travellers pass through terminal
item.description: Symptoms can take up to three weeks to appear, health officials warn.

item.title: Elderly man charged with manslaughter following death of aged care resident in Brisbane
item.description: The two men were allegedly involved in an altercation at an aged care facility.

item.title: Golden Slipper winner Zac Lloyd chasing more Group 1 glory at Rosehill
item.description: The in-form jockey is keen to capitalise on his Golden Slipper success.

item.title: Charges laid against two teens over Cairns bus stop rampage as fourth victim allegedly threatened with knife
item.description: Police allege the pair unleashed a violent spree of assaults and robbery near a shopping centre.

item.title: Severe weather live updates: Cyclone Narelle upgraded to category 4 as it bears down on WA
item.description: Follow the latest updates from weather events impacting the country.

item.title: Hoon noise camera trial ends, but more could pop up soon
item.description: A trial of noise-capturing cameras in NSW has ended with mixed results, but now a Melbourne council is calling for its own trial.

item.title: Therapeutic Goods Administration announces consultation on proposed sunscreen reforms
item.description: Several products sold in Australia have been recalled after testing revealed many were not meeting their SPF claims.

item.title: Michael Maguire rolls out same answer during intense grilling over departure of Ben Te’o
item.description: The Broncos coach refused to go into detail about the sudden exit of his assistant.

item.title: Gout Gout on Maurie Plant revenge mission after last year’s loss to Lachlan Kennedy: ‘Run it back’
item.description: ‘We’ll see what’s up.’

item.title: Sydney teacher arrested and charged after allegedly trying to pay teenage girl for sexually explicit content
item.description: The 29-year-old has been refused bail.

item.title: 2026 Ford F-150 review
item.description: Ford is on a mission to flip its fortunes with the F-150 pickup truck, offering more features and tech, and the promise of fewer recalls.

item.title: Woman dies after being pulled unresponsive from water on Lord Howe Island
item.description: Members of the public performed CPR, but she was later pronounced dead at a hospital.

item.title: Footscray rental dubbed Melbourne’s ‘worst’ after listing sparks outrage online
item.description: A real estate agent called it 'charming' but the listing has now been referred to the rental watchdog.

item.title: ‘Magic is back’: Teaser drops for remake of beloved Harry Potter series
item.description: Hogwarts is back in session, sparking a fresh wave of ‘Pottermania’.

item.title: Ross Lyon adds fuel to rivalry with northern clubs Gold Coast and Brisbane: ‘Who is Tony Cochrane?’
item.description: The Saints coach landed a number of shots before abruptly finishing his media conference.

item.title: AFL unveils revamped illicit drugs policy: ‘Most stringent in Australian sport’
item.description: All players will be hair-tested twice a year in the new initiative.

item.title: Australian supplier to Ferrari, Ford in administration after EV stumble
item.description: The Australian manufacturer of lightweight carbon-fibre wheels for brands including Ford, Lamborghini and Ferrari is being restructured after recording losses.

item.title: Nathan Cleary drops contract stunner on Penrith as halfback refuses to rule out testing open market
item.description: The superstar has issued a rare statement opening the door to an unthinkable move.

item.title: Trailblazer Michelle Payne celebrates ‘truly extraordinary’ new honour as statue unveiled
item.description: The Melbourne Cup winner’s ‘most amazing journey’ has reached a new high on an emotional day at Flemington.
